predicate.title: Knowledge-first documentation: prose becomes generated views over .asdlc/knowledge
predicate.problem: The docs folder holds prose written for agent context, but prose is not addressable: an agent must read whole documents to recall one decision, and hand-maintained docs can drift from what the framework actually does. Owner directive: re-architect the prose as persistent knowledge and generate every human doc from it.
acceptance_criteria: All README/PURPOSE/design-doc content lives as typed nodes under .asdlc/knowledge with schemas in spec/knowledge
spec/tools/scaffold.py regenerates every generated doc byte-identically from the knowledge (--check passes)
CI (spec-check) fails when a generated doc is edited directly
The roadmap carries this as Priority 0 with its remaining follow-ups
out_of_scope: Typed link enrichment between nodes and the orchestrator knowledge.query tool (slices 3+)
